description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:9.3.0 Docker image and a before_script that runs apt-get -qq update and apt-get install -y jq. Define a single job called build_and_test_contracts (default stage) that caches the node_modules/ directory, runs npm install, npm run compile, npm run automate-test, then extracts each contract's ABI with `jq '.abi' < \"$file\" > \"${file%.json}.abi\"` and bytecode with `jq -r '.bytecode' < \"$file\" > \"${file%.json}.bin\"` for all JSON files in build/contracts, and finally flattens all Solidity source files using truffle-flattener into build/flattened/. The job stores the build/ directory as an artifact that expires after one month. No additional stages, services, or conditional rules are defined.
